hex.config.title: Hex Config
hex.config.profiles_button.tooltip: Manage your saved setups: switch between them, rename them, and share them.
hex.config.reset_tab.tooltip: Restore every setting on this tab to its default.
hex.config.reset_tab.title: Reset this tab?
hex.config.reset_tab.message: Restore every %s setting to its default?
hex.config.reset_tab.detail: Your saved profile is untouched, so Discard on the Profiles screen brings these settings back.
hex.config.hand.enabled.tooltip: Master switch for the position, scale, rotation and swing settings below. When off, those are kept but ignored. Per-item swing rules have their own switch and keep working.
hex.config.hand.offset_x.tooltip: Moves the main hand right (positive) or left (negative).
hex.config.hand.offset_y.tooltip: Moves the main hand up (positive) or down (negative).
hex.config.hand.offset_z.tooltip: Moves the main hand away from (positive) or towards (negative) the camera.
hex.config.hand.scale.tooltip: Size of the main-hand arm and item.
hex.config.hand.rotation_x.tooltip: Tilts the main hand up and down.
hex.config.hand.rotation_y.tooltip: Turns the main hand left and right.
hex.config.hand.rotation_z.tooltip: Rolls the main hand around its own axis.
hex.config.hand.disable_swing.tooltip: Hides the first-person swing entirely. Attacking, mining and item use are unaffected — only the animation is hidden.
hex.config.hand.swing_items_enabled.tool: Master switch for the per-item list below. Independent of the Enabled switch at the top of this tab, so the list keeps working with the rest of the hand settings off.
hex.config.hand.swing_items.tooltip: Choose Skyblock items whose swing animation is always hidden while you hold them, whatever the switch above says.
hex.config.hand.swing_speed.tooltip: How fast the swing animation plays. This is cosmetic: your attack cooldown and mining speed are unchanged. Has no effect while the swing animation is disabled, and also applies to your own third-person model.
hex.config.freecam.enabled.tooltip: Master switch for the freecam feature and its keybind.
hex.config.freecam.fly_speed.tooltip: Base camera fly speed. Scroll the mouse wheel while flying to fine-tune it.
hex.config.updates.enabled.tooltip: Check GitHub for a newer release each launch and stage it automatically.
hex.config.updates.include_prereleases.t: Treat GitHub pre-releases as updates too.
hex.config.updates.check_now.tooltip: Check GitHub for a newer release right now.
hex.config.keybinds.open_screen.tooltip: Open the keybind editor to add, edit and remove custom shortcuts.
hex.profiles.title: Hex Profiles
hex.profiles.duplicate.tooltip: Make a copy of this profile.
hex.profiles.edit.tooltip: Rename this profile, describe it, or set when it activates by itself.
hex.profiles.delete.tooltip: Delete this profile and its saved settings.
hex.profiles.delete.last.tooltip: The last remaining profile cannot be deleted.
hex.profiles.save.tooltip: Store your current settings into the active profile.
hex.profiles.discard.tooltip: Throw away your changes and reload the active profile as it was last saved.
hex.profiles.new.tooltip: Create a profile from the settings you have right now.
hex.profiles.export.tooltip: Copy every Hex setting to the clipboard as text you can send to someone else or keep as a backup.
hex.profiles.import.tooltip: Load a Hex export from the clipboard, either over this profile or as a new one.
hex.profiles.reset_all.tooltip: Restore every Hex setting to its default.
hex.profiles.capture_keys.tooltip: Also save Minecraft's own key bindings in each profile. Off by default: this covers every binding, including other mods', so switching a profile can undo a rebind you made elsewhere.
hex.profiles.new.title: New profile
hex.profiles.edit.title: Edit profile
hex.profiles.duplicate.title: Copy profile
hex.profiles.edit.name: Name
hex.profiles.edit.error.unusable: That name has no letters or digits in it.
hex.profiles.edit.error.taken: A profile with that name already exists.
hex.profiles.switch_prompt.title: Unsaved changes
hex.profiles.switch_prompt.message: Profile "%s" has changes you have not saved.
hex.profiles.switch_prompt.detail: Switching to "%s" will replace your current settings.
hex.profiles.discard.title: Discard changes?
hex.profiles.discard.message: Reload profile "%s" as it was last saved?
hex.profiles.discard.detail: Everything you have changed since then will be lost.
hex.profiles.delete.title: Delete profile?
hex.profiles.delete.detail: Its saved settings are removed for good.
hex.profiles.import.title: Paste settings
hex.profiles.import.message: How should the settings on your clipboard be used?
hex.profiles.import.detail: Importing here replaces your current settings; importing as new keeps them.
hex.profiles.reset_all.title: Reset everything?
hex.profiles.reset_all.message: Restore every Hex setting to its default?
hex.profiles.reset_all.detail: Your saved profiles are untouched — Discard brings the active one back.
hex.swing_items.title: Per-item swing
hex.swing_items.empty: No items yet. Hold a Skyblock item and press Add held item.
hex.swing_items.kind.tooltip: Item ID matches every copy of an item, such as HYPERION. UUID matches one specific item, and only unique items have one.
hex.swing_items.add_held.tooltip: Add the Skyblock item in your main hand.
hex.swing_items.add_held.unavailable: Hold a Skyblock item to add it. Vanilla items have no ID to match on.
hex.swing_items.add_empty.tooltip: Add a blank rule to type an ID into.
hex.config.reminders.enabled.tooltip: Master switch. When off, nothing counts down and the panel is hidden, but your reminders are kept.
hex.config.reminders.hud_position.toolti: Drag the reminder panel to where you want it on screen.
hex.config.reminders.hud_corner.tooltip: Which corner of the panel stays put as reminders are added and removed.
hex.config.reminders.sort.tooltip: How the panel orders reminders. Anything firing is always shown first.
hex.config.reminders.hud_scale.tooltip: How large the panel is drawn.
hex.config.reminders.max_rows.tooltip: How many reminders the panel lists before collapsing the rest into a "+N more" line.
hex.config.reminders.background.tooltip: Draw a backing box behind the reminders so they stay readable over bright scenery.
hex.config.reminders.background_color.to: Panel background as #AARRGGBB. The first pair is opacity, so 80 is half transparent.
hex.config.reminders.flash_color.tooltip: The colour a reminder flashes in when it fires.
hex.config.reminders.skyblock_only.toolt: Hide the panel when the scoreboard does not look like Skyblock's.
hex.config.reminders.show_when_empty.too: Keep the panel on screen even when nothing is counting down.
hex.config.reminders.sound_enabled.toolt: Master switch for every reminder's sound. Individual reminders can still be set to make no sound.
hex.config.reminders.flash_seconds.toolt: How long a reminder stays highlighted on the panel after it fires.
hex.config.reminders.snooze_minutes.tool: How far the snooze keybind pushes a firing reminder back.
hex.reminders.hud.title: Reminder panel position
hex.reminders.hud.hint: Drag the panel, or nudge it with the arrow keys — hold Shift to move further.
hex.config.reminders.edit_list.tooltip: Add, edit and delete your reminders.
hex.config.reminders.presets.tooltip: Browse ready-made reminders and add the ones you want.
hex.reminders.title: Reminders
hex.reminders.empty: No reminders yet. Press Add, or take one from Presets.
hex.reminders.add.tooltip: Create a blank reminder and open it for editing.
hex.reminders.toggle.tooltip: Switch this reminder on or off. Switching a preset off does not count as editing it, so it still receives updates.
hex.reminders.delete.tooltip: Delete this reminder and its countdown.
hex.reminders.edit.title: Edit reminder
hex.config.reminder_edit.name: Name
hex.config.reminder_edit.name.tooltip: What this reminder is called in the list.
hex.config.reminder_edit.text.tooltip: Shown on the panel when this fires. For a chat trigger, $1 to $9 insert the pattern's capture groups and $0 the whole match. Write $$ for a literal dollar sign.
hex.config.reminder_edit.trigger_pattern: The chat text to watch for. A regular expression unless Plain text is on — put (?i) at the start to ignore case, and use (…) to capture a part for the message.
The island name as it appears on the scoreboard, such as "dwarven mines".
hex.config.reminder_edit.trigger_item.to: The Skyblock item ID, such as HYPERION.
hex.config.reminder_edit.literal.tooltip: Match the pattern as ordinary text rather than a regular expression. Simpler, and it cannot capture anything.
hex.config.reminder_edit.delay.tooltip: How long after the trigger to fire. Write 0 to fire straight away, or something like 45s, 20m, 2h30m, 4d.
hex.config.reminder_edit.repeat.tooltip: Start the countdown again as soon as it fires.
hex.config.reminder_edit.conditions.tool: Limit when this is allowed to fire — for example, only on one island.
hex.config.reminder_edit.sound_id.toolti: A sound id, such as minecraft:block.note_block.pling. Press Test to hear it.
hex.config.reminder_edit.reset_preset.to: Discard your changes and take the version that ships with the mod.
hex.reminders.conditions.title: Conditions
hex.reminders.conditions.empty: No conditions — this reminder always fires.
hex.reminders.conditions.add.tooltip: Add a test that must pass for this reminder to fire.
hex.reminders.presets.title: Reminder presets
hex.reminders.preset.forge_on_arrival.de: Reminds you to look at your forge slots whenever you arrive in the Dwarven Mines.
hex.reminders.preset.hourly_check.name: Hourly check-in
hex.reminders.preset.hourly_check.desc: Every hour on Skyblock, a nudge to check pets, forge and bazaar orders.
hex.config.suggest.enabled.tooltip: Suggest commands in the chat box, learned from the ones you actually use.
hex.config.suggest.learning.tooltip: Off keeps suggesting from what it already knows, but records nothing new.
hex.config.suggest.dashboard.tooltip: Inspect, pin, block or forget individual commands, and see why each one is suggested.
hex.config.suggest.popup.tooltip: Show the ranked list above the chat box. Arrow keys move, Tab accepts, Escape dismisses.
hex.config.suggest.ghost_text.tooltip: Grey out the rest of the line as you type, when the guess is confident enough.
hex.config.suggest.next_command.tooltip: Typing just a slash offers what you would most likely want here — from your location, what you are holding, and what you just ran.
hex.config.suggest.rows.tooltip: How many suggestions the list shows at once.
hex.config.suggest.confidence.tooltip: How sure it must be before completing the line inline. Higher means it stays quiet more often.
hex.config.suggest.adaptation.tooltip: How fast old habits are forgotten. Faster suits play that changes week to week.
hex.config.suggest.accept_key.tooltip: Which key takes the highlighted suggestion or the inline completion.
hex.config.suggest.catalogue_priors.tool: Offer common Skyblock commands before you have used them. Off means nothing is suggested until you type it yourself.
hex.config.suggest.learn_player_names.to: Remember who you message and visit, so their names complete. Message text is never recorded either way.
hex.config.suggest.forget_all.tooltip: Wipe every command Hex has learned. Your settings are kept.
hex.suggest.title: What Hex has learned
hex.suggest.empty: Nothing learned yet — run some commands and come back.
hex.suggest.learning.tooltip: Pause to keep the suggestions you have but stop recording new commands.
hex.suggest.why.tooltip: Show exactly why this is suggested, here and now.
hex.suggest.pin.tooltip: Pin to the top of every list it appears in.
hex.suggest.block.tooltip: Never suggest this, and stop recording it.
hex.suggest.forget_all.confirm: Forget every command Hex has learned?
hex.suggest.forget_all.detail: Your settings are kept. This cannot be undone.
hex.suggest.why.title: Why this suggestion
